title: Hair and Nail Care * Veterans - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Hair and Nail Care * Veterans 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF VETERANS STAND DOWNS AND VETERANS EVENTS STAND DOWN EVENTS VETERANS STAND DOWN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an annual health and wellness resource event. Services may include health screening, medical and dental care, vision, housing resources, counseling and substance abuse referrals, haircuts, pet care, job fairs, help accessing VA services and benefits, DMV and legal assistance. Meals, clothing, and hygiene supplies may also be offered. Eligibility: Veterans and military personnel; focus is generally on homeless and at-risk veterans Hours: Varies by event Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
